500.description: Forest Green 500 — base for opacity scale

default.description: Brand primary — CTA, nav active, button fill. WCAG AA 6.1:1 on white ✓

light.description: Selected state bg, tag fill, info zone bg

alpha30.description: Focus ring color — applied as box-shadow

default.description: Accent — promotions, sale badges, highlights. Max 10% density.

light.description: Promo banner bg, warm notification surface

primary.description: Page canvas — Cream Parchment. Warm, not clinical white.

secondary.description: Sidebar, footer, alternate table rows — Linen

primary.description: Main body text — Charcoal Ink. WCAG AAA 14.8:1 ✓. Never #000000.

secondary.description: Subheadings, metadata, dates — Pewter. WCAG AA 5.4:1 ✓

muted.description: Placeholder, disabled (large text only). 2.8:1 — decorative use only.

default.description: Dividers, input strokes at rest, card separators
Success icon + text on light bg
Dark mode CTA — lighter for contrast on dark bg

light.description: Dark mode primary light — very dark tint

primary.description: Dark page bg — Charcoal, NOT pure #000

card.description: Dark card surface — elevated above bg

overlay.description: Dark mode modal scrim — deeper black

muted.description: Dark muted text — same stop as light mode

heading.description: Editorial serif — brand authority. Pair with body for contrast.

body.description: Geometric humanist sans — all UI text, labels, CTAs.

mono.description: Monospace — promo codes, order IDs, tracking numbers.

bold.description: H1-H2 (DM Sans), price tags, strong CTA

16.description: Body — never below this for paragraphs

displayLarge.description: Hero banner headline — massive editorial statement

heading1.description: Page-level title — Shop All, Cart Summary

heading2.description: Category section headers, major card groups

heading4.description: Card titles, accordion headers, table col headers

bodyLarge.description: Hero subtitle, feature description, lead paragraph

body.description: Standard body — never below 16px for paragraphs

bodySmall.description: Product descriptions, secondary meta, help text

label.description: Button text, form labels, nav links, chip text

labelSmall.description: Small buttons, badge labels, icon labels

overline.description: Category eyebrows — FRESH ARRIVALS, ON SALE. Always uppercase.

focusPrimary.description: Primary focus ring — WCAG AA compliant
